## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content strategy services to Outreach's marketing team and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive AI-driven content creation, SEO, and publishing services](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Their approach focuses on building trust through high-quality, audience-centric content](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Outreach team sees potential value in accelerating content production and technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [GrowthX can integrate with Outreach's CMS (Craft) and ramp up within 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focuses on helping brands become publishers, building trust with audiences](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows to collaborate with experts, scaling content rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Starts with deep editorial strategy, understanding audiences and their needs](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Develops a unique "publication" voice for each client](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Implements a 12-week process: kickoff, research, style guide, content calibration](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Content Creation and Management

  - [Generates 1000+ potential content assignments based on keywords and audience needs](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Publishes directly to client's CMS, including image creation](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Provides weekly results updates and strategy calibration](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Offers full content function as a service, including managing editors and directors](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)

### SEO and Technical Optimization

  - [Conducts initial site audits for technical SEO hygiene](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Addresses indexing issues, navigation, page speed, and migration leftovers](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Performs gap analysis to identify high-potential content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Uses workflows for cross-linking, content refreshes, and updates](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### Integration with Outreach

  - [Can access Outreach's Craft CMS directly or work through staging environment](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Will conduct CMS walkthrough and publishing process training](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Aims to take on "grunt work" to free up Outreach team's time](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)

### Proposed Engagement

  - [Recommends starting with editorial focus, 100,000 words/month](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Approximately 50 articles/month (mix of new and refreshed content)](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Includes SEO audits, health checks, editorial staging, publishing, and graphics](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [Weekly meetings and strategy sessions](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - Outreach team to internally discuss the proposal
  - [Holly to follow up with GrowthX team this week regarding decision](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [If moving forward, potential kick-off and deep dive in week 1](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Calibration process and strategy alignment in week 2](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing by weeks 3-4](https://fathom.video/share/Fx9-zjqEFyFP5b2xADswWSosWQ5xzDof?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
